title: SwapBallsReborn [Cobblemon]
description: SwapBallsReborn let's you swap your Pokémon's catch ball in survival mode.
body:
---

🟡 SwapBallsReborn ⚪

SwapBallReborn in the Cobblemon mod. This datapack adds a way to switch your Pokémon's catch ball in survival mode. Originally made by dicedom. (Cobblemon Swap Pokeball)

Updated for newer versions of Cobblemon with added features and bug fixes. This addon uses a resourcepack!

To use this addon just download the zip and place it in the datapack's folder of your minecraft world and resourcepack folder of your game. Both Datapack and Resourcepack are in a single zip.

📋 Ball Capsule Recipe ⚪


⚙️ How it works 📖



Hold a Ball Capsule in your main hand and a Pokéball in your off-hand. When you crouch, your first Pokémon's Pokéball will be replaced with the Pokéball you're holding in your off-hand. Additionally, you can rename the Ball Capsule to any number corresponding to a Pokémon slot (e.g., renaming it to "2" will affect the second Pokémon slot). This way, you can change the Pokéball of any Pokémon by selecting its corresponding slot number through the renamed Ball Capsule.

Have some issues? You can join the Official Cobblemon discord server, search for 'SwapBallsReborn' and ask your questions there, or alternatively, you can DM me on discord.
